data.title: Solayer team members released a relationship diagram of LIBRA stakeholders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Chaofan Shou, a member of the Solayer team, released a LIBRA-related party relationship diagram on X, saying: "All information can be traced on the chain. There may be inaccuracies. If there is anything incorrect, please send a private message to let me know."

data.title: Chaofan Shou clarifies rumors: He is not the founder of Solayer but a core developer, and the funds lost on LIBRA came from individuals
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Solayer team member Chaofan Shou issued the following disclaimer regarding some rumors currently circulating in the community:
"I joined Solayer in the Fuzzland acquisition transaction. I am not the founder of Solayer, just a core developer. What I lost on LIBRA was my personal funds.
Over the past few years, I have accumulated wealth by actively investing in ETH and multiple projects. I also trade Meme coins, and losing $1 million is acceptable to me - but I feel very sad about Solana. These conspiracy gangs are ruining SOL."

data.title: HYPE has risen 176% since its launch, outperforming BTC and ETH during the same period
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that Hyperliquid's HYPE token has risen 176% since its launch, outperforming BTC and ETH during the same period.

data.title: US Vice President Vance responded to the report that "military means are not ruled out to promote peace talks with Russia": The speech has been distorted, which is ridiculous
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Wall Street Journal published a report on the 14th titled "Vance threatens to impose sanctions or take military action to force Putin to reach an agreement with Ukraine."
According to the U.S. Capitol Hill and Russia's TASS on the 15th, Vance responded to the report, accusing the newspaper of "distorting" his answers to Trump's questions about Russia's position in the interview.
The Kremlin said it had noticed Vance's rebuttal to the report. "It's ridiculous that the Wall Street Journal distorted my words in this report, but it's not surprising considering that they have been pushing for more American sons and daughters to be deployed overseas unnecessarily for many years." Vance posted on the social platform X.
TASS said that Russian Presidential Press Secretary Peskov told the media on the 15th that the Kremlin had noticed Vance's statement that the Wall Street Journal distorted his remarks. (Jinshi)

data.title: This week, NFT sales fell 35.15% month-on-month to $112.7 million, and the number of traders surged by more than 500%.
XRPL ecosystem tokens SOLO and COREUM have risen by more than 21% in the past week. The probability of XRP ETF being approved within this year is temporarily reported to be 80%.
KIP Protocol responds: Mauricio Novelli is not a member of the team and never held a meeting with the Argentine president in January
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News KIP Protocol published a statement on X: "Mauricio Novelli has never been a member of the KIP Protocol team, but the founder of TechForum Argentina, and KIP Protocol became its sponsor in October 2024. KIP Protocol never held any meeting with Argentine President Javier Milei in January 2025."
Earlier today, the Argentine Presidential Office issued a statement on LIBRA on X: "On October 19, President Milei met with representatives of KIP Protocol in Argentina, where he learned that the company intends to develop a project called Viva la Libertad to use blockchain technology to fund private enterprises in the Argentine Republic.
The president attended the meeting, which has been officially recorded in the public hearing register. Participants included KIP Protocol company representatives Mauricio Novellli and Julian Peh and presidential spokesman Manuel Adorni.
Against this background, on January 30, 2025, the president held a meeting with Hayden Mark Davis at the Rose Palace. According to KIP Protocol representatives said Davis would provide the technical infrastructure for his project. Davis, who has no past or present ties to the Argentine government, was introduced by KIP Protocol representatives as one of the project’s partners.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
CZ: BTC is more like a reserve asset than a transaction currency. A lot of new funds are buying ETFs but are not reflected on the chain.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Regarding the statement that "BTC on-chain transaction volume is far from the 2021 level", CZ wrote on X: "My intuition is that due to high fees and long block times, BTC is now more like a reserve asset than a transaction currency. A lot of new funds are buying ETFs, and these ETFs are not reflected in on-chain transactions. I may be wrong."

data.title: KIP Protocol Denies Involvement With Argentine President's Office
data.description:
According to PANews, KIP Protocol has issued a statement refuting claims made by the Argentine President's office. The protocol clarified that Mauricio Novelli has never been a member of the KIP Protocol team nor has he joined them at any point. Novelli is known as the founder of TechForum Argentina, and KIP Protocol sponsored him in October 2024. The protocol also stated that no meetings occurred with Javier Milei in January 2025.

Previously, the Argentine President's office announced that the president had requested the anti-corruption office to intervene and establish an investigative task force.
